# Amble & Fox

> Websites Built for Indian Exporters

We build high-performance, export-ready websites and digital showrooms for Indian handicraft, furniture, textile, and decor manufacturers. 

## Pricing
- Basic: ₹9,000 one-time + ₹499/mo
- Standard: ₹19,000 one-time + ₹999/mo (Most Popular)
- Pro: ₹29,000 one-time + ₹1,499/mo

## Services
- Digital showrom website design
- QR Code generation for booths and products
- Downloadable PDF Catalogs
- Product Photography
